title: OpenAuth Final — Gateway nginx + auth_request
architecture: Gateway nginx:80 com auth_request. Subdominios direto para OpenCode sem proxy Node.
fluxo: Browser -> Cloudflare(https) -> Traefik -> Gateway nginx:80 -> auth_request 200 -> proxy direto para opencode-*:4096
fixes: Voltou ao modelo original (Alternativa 3): gateway nginx, sem http-proxy-middleware
nginx.conf: auth_request ao /auth-check antes de proxy para OpenCode
nginx.conf: hardcode https no redirect (evita $scheme virar http)
server.js: removido http-proxy-middleware, mantido so auth + dashboard
package.json: removido http-proxy-middleware, corrigido trailing comma
deploy: git push hub-agentes HEAD:infra-unify + redeploy no Dokploy
